uplink.description: Data report: 1013.25 hPa atmospheric pressure, 25.01 C, 3.6 V (upstream reference example input)
uplink._note: Input is the upstream TTN example status-report frame; expected.data authored here and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (AirPressure 1013.25 hPa, Temp 25.01 C, Volt 3.6 V). Pressure 1013.25 hPa is standard sea-level atmospheric pressure, confirming a genuine barometer.
Synthetic in-bounds frame (pressure raw 99500 Pa = 995.0 hPa, within 900-1100). expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js as the oracle (AirPressure 995, Temp 18.5, Volt 3.6).

uplink.description: Data report: 1020.0 hPa, -5.25 C, low battery 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame (pressure raw 102000 Pa = 1020.0 hPa, within 900-1100; negative temperature exercises two's-complement; byte[3] high bit set => low battery). Oracle reference/upstream-codec.js reports AirPressure 1020, Temp -5.25, Volt '3(low battery)'.
Upstream TTN example startup version report input. reportType byte[2]==0x00 is a device-info frame; our codec rejects it as carrying no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is rejected
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example ConfigReportRsp input. fPort 7 carries config responses, not measurements; our codec only decodes fPort 6.
